name: Spain
full: Spain — Red Eléctrica, Iberdrola & CDTI Innovation
sub: Spain is Europe's largest renewable energy producer and grid operator, with Red Eléctrica investing €13.59B in transmission networks 2025-2030. Iberdrola PERSEO has invested €200M+ in AI portfolio. CDTI and IDAE provide €300M+ annually.
desc: Red Eléctrica (REE) operates Spain's high-voltage grid and is investing €13.59B across 2025-2030 specifically for renewable integration. Elewit Ventures is REE's corporate venture arm. Iberdrola PERSEO international startup program has invested €200M+ with explicit AI focus. CDTI (national R&D agency) and IDAE (energy agency) provide €300M+ annually in grants. Spanish company registration takes 2-4 weeks.

studies.label: Red Eléctrica Innovation Partnerships
studies.text:
What it doesRed Eléctrica operates 48,000+ km of Spanish grid with explicit AI/digitalisation roadmap. €13.59B allocated to transmission networks 2025-2030. Direct vendor partnerships for grid automation, forecasting, and congestion management. Elewit Ventures (REE corporate venture) actively invests in energy-tech startups.How to applyDirect approach to REE Innovation team or pitch to Elewit Ventures as VC deal.
Red EléctricaElewit Ventures

studies.label: Iberdrola PERSEO
studies.text:
What it doesInternational startup programme with €200M+ invested in AI, renewable integration, and grid management portfolio. Equity and strategic partnership model. Explicit focus on next-generation grid technologies.Why it mattersDirect access to Europe's largest utility (81M customers). Iberdola operates in Spain, Portugal, UK, US, Mexico, and Brazil.
Iberdrola PERSEO

studies.label: CDTI R&D Funding (NEOTEC 2025+)
studies.text:
What it doesSpain's Centre for Industrial Technological Development. NEOTEC programme funds R&D projects in AI, climate, and energy. Grants cover 40-75% of eligible costs. €300M+ pool across all sectors. Rolling applications via online portal.RequirementsSpanish company registration required (2-4 weeks to establish SL/SLU).
CDTI PortalNEOTEC 2025

studies.label: IDAE Energy Innovation Grants
studies.text:
What it doesSpanish Institute for Energy Diversification & Saving. Dedicated innovation budget (€200M+) for grid modernisation, distributed energy, and AI integration. 50-75% cost coverage for approved projects.
IDAE Portal

studies.label: ENISA (SME Growth Support)
studies.text:
What it doesSpanish state-owned entity providing quasi-equity loans (€300K-€1.5M) and growth financing for SMEs. No interest during growth phase. Explicit support for DeepTech and ClimaTech.
ENISA Portal

studies.label: Endesa Innovation (Enel Group)
studies.text:
What it doesEnel Group's Spanish utility Endesa runs open innovation with vendor partnerships. €150M+ portfolio. Joint ventures with startups in grid automation and forecasting.
Endesa Innovation

studies.label: Horizon Europe (via Spain)
studies.text:
What it doesUK companies can participate post-Brexit as Associated Country. Spain routes some funding via Spanish tech clusters. EIC Accelerator grants (€2.5M) available for Spanish-led consortia.
EU Funding Portal

workflow.detail: Pitch grid automation solution. €13.59B 2025-2030 transmission investment.
Equity deal — prepare pitch deck, metrics, product demo.
2-4 weeks. €3-5K legal fees. Unlocks CDTI, IDAE, ENISA.

faq.q: What is Red Eléctrica's €13.59B investment targeting?
faq.a: Transmission network modernisation 2025-2030, with explicit focus on renewable integration, AI automation, and congestion management. This is the single largest grid infrastructure investment in Southern Europe.

faq.q: How much has Iberdrola PERSEO invested to date?
faq.a: €200M+ in portfolio across AI, renewable integration, and grid tech startups. PERSEO explicitly positions grid interconnection queue management as a priority.

faq.q: How quickly can I register a Spanish company?
faq.a: 2-4 weeks for SL (Ltd) or SLU (limited liability sole trader). Costs €3-5K for legal registration. This unlocks access to CDTI (€300M), IDAE (€200M), and ENISA funding.

faq.q: What's the difference between CDTI and IDAE grants?
faq.a: CDTI focuses on R&D and technology development (40-75% subsidy). IDAE focuses on energy innovation and deployment (50-75% subsidy). Both are worth applying to in parallel.

faq.q: Can we pitch to multiple Spanish utilities?
faq.a: Yes. Red Eléctrica, Endesa, Iberdrola, and regional utilities all have independent innovation partnerships. They typically don't have exclusivity clauses for technology partnerships.

note: Spain is Europe's renewable energy leader with €13.59B transmission investment 2025-2030. Elewit Ventures (REE) and Iberdrola PERSEO offer immediate VC access. Spanish registration (2-4 weeks) unlocks €500M+ in government grants (CDTI, IDAE, ENISA).
